name: Molasses Candy (Old-fashioned Pull Taffy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Boil the mixture until it reaches a hard crack stage, as tested by dropping a small amount into cold water and having it become brittle.
3. Pour the mixture onto a buttered dish to cool.
4. Once cooled enough to handle, rub butter on hands and pull the candy in small portions until light in color.
5. Cut into small pieces.
